title: Egyptian Spicy Potato Fries
description: A crispy and flavorful twist on traditional French fries. This Egyptian-inspired recipe combines spicy and tender potato fries with a crunchy starch topping.
instructions: Cut the potatoes into long, thin strips.
Heat the oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the potato strips to the hot oil and fry for 5 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove the fried potatoes from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
In a separate bowl, mix the hot sauce and starch together until well combined.
Toss the fried potatoes in the spicy starch mixture until the potatoes are evenly coated.
Serve the Egyptian spicy potato fries hot and enjoy!
